motion: PR #103 — chore: T4 — Floor scene + tower layout should be merged into feature/86-feature-phase-1-skeleton-tower

fixes.description: Add existence guard to _on_agent_registered at tower_manager.gd:163 — add `if _agent_assignments.has(agent_data.id): return` before _find_best_edge_for_agent is called. Prevents permanent _agent_assignments/_agent_slots desync on reconnect re-registration.

pr_amendments: Add to PR description: 'Fixes idempotency gap in _on_agent_registered — adds existence guard to prevent _agent_assignments/_agent_slots desync on reconnect.'
